title: WhisperDeliver silently discarded when mls_active=true — no comment for future DM work
description: commands.rs WhisperDeliver arm: 'if !mls_active { match mls.join_from_welcome... }' — when mls_active is true, any WhisperDeliver is silently dropped with no logging. No comment explains what Whisper messages might carry in future phases (MLS proposals, direct messages). A contributor implementing Phase 2 DMs will add a Whisper-based feature, see messages disappearing silently, and have no indication why. Fix: add a comment explaining that the current code only handles Welcomes, and that future DM Whispers will need a content-type discriminator (e.g., an envelope wrapper distinguishing Welcome from DM payloads).
